production_note: agentic_K1 dual-LLM Skeptic: sealed receipt write; packet-only; no bulk writers; no identity stamps
knowledge_boundary: Only landing + prior + active packet content.

exercises.code:
# Skeptic packet solve S45-T1-A-E1: fix predicate so valid fixture PASSes
record = {"case_id": "CASO-IQU-045-1A", **{"blob_store":"object","transactions":"relational","cache_authoritative":False,"cache_ttl_s":300}}
meets_contract = not (record["cache_authoritative"] or record["transactions"] == "cache")
status = "PASS" if meets_contract else "REDESIGN_PERSISTENCE"
print("S45-T1-A", status)
assert status == "PASS", status
exercises.justification_from_packet: Revalidé con escepticismo el contrato de «object store, relacional y cache» usando el fixture CASO-IQU-045 del paquete activo; la rama esperada distingue REDESIGN_PERSISTENCE y no inventa evidencia ni oculta el fallo.

Comprobé que el predicado de «object store, relacional y cache» usando la instruction de S45-T1-A-E2 y sus hints de dominio; la rama esperada distingue PASS, REDESIGN_PERSISTENCE y no inventa evidencia ni oculta el fallo.

Crucé hints y theory para «object store, relacional y cache» usando theory «object store, relacional y cache» y el iDo de la sección; la rama esperada distingue REDESIGN_PERSISTENCE, WRITE_STORE_ADR y no inventa evidencia ni oculta el fallo.

# Skeptic packet solve S45-T2-B-E1: fix predicate so valid fixture PASSes
